title: Ignore the error when running `podman machine ssh <command>`
body:
Fixes the error that occurs when executing a command without a machine name when using podman-machine-default.
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/21183 (and fix PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21114)

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
